name: Priya Chandrasekaran
bio: Spent seven years building settlement infrastructure at a tier-1 card network before going independent. Shipped the FX netting engine still running in production at two banks.

priorVentures.name: Meridian Clearing (acquired)
priorVentures.outcome: Acquired by a regional bank holding co. for an undisclosed sum after 3 years

timeline.label: Meridian Clearing acquired
timeline.detail: Sold engineering team and IP to a regional bank holding company.

timeline.label: Joined a payments infra team as principal engineer
timeline.detail: Rebuilt cross-border netting for a top-5 card network.

timeline.label: Founded Ledgerline
timeline.detail: Left to build real-time cross-border settlement rails.

name: Marcus Oyelaran
bio: Former remote-sensing scientist at a regional agricultural ministry, spun out soil-carbon modeling work into a startup after a pilot with three cooperatives outperformed manual audits.

priorVentures.name: Kilimo Analytics
priorVentures.outcome: Wound down after 18 months when the core grant funder redirected budget

timeline.label: Founded Kilimo Analytics
timeline.detail: Built yield-prediction models for smallholder cooperatives.

timeline.label: Wound down Kilimo Analytics
timeline.detail: Grant funding redirected; returned to research role.

timeline.label: Founded Terraware with Ingrid Vasko
timeline.detail: Applied prior modeling work to satellite-based carbon MRV.

name: Ingrid Vasko
bio: PhD in remote sensing focused on canopy-density inversion models. Published the underlying MRV methodology Terraware licenses before co-founding the company.

timeline.label: Published soil-carbon MRV methodology
timeline.detail: Peer-reviewed method now licensed to Terraware.

timeline.label: Co-founded Terraware
timeline.detail: Joined Marcus Oyelaran to commercialize the methodology.

name: Dev Patel
bio: Core contributor to a widely used Postgres extension for logical replication. No prior company; built Fluxbase's branching engine as an open-source side project that crossed 4,000 GitHub stars before incorporating.

timeline.label: Opened Fluxbase branching engine as OSS
timeline.detail: Side project targeting CI-time database branching.

timeline.label: Crossed 4,000 GitHub stars
timeline.detail: Organic adoption among CI/CD tooling teams triggered incorporation.

timeline.label: Incorporated Fluxbase
timeline.detail: Left day job to build full-time.

name: Dr. Lina Feuerstein
bio: Structural biologist, 12 years in computational protein design at a major pharma research org. Led the team that shipped two binder-design pipelines now used internally.

priorVentures.name: Structa Bio (acquired)
priorVentures.outcome: Acquired by a specialty biotech for its binder-screening pipeline

timeline.label: Founded Structa Bio
timeline.detail: Built early ML-assisted binder screening tools.

timeline.label: Structa Bio acquired
timeline.detail: Acquired by a specialty biotech for the screening pipeline.

timeline.label: Founded Proteova with Tobias Reyn
timeline.detail: Generative protein binder design for undruggable targets.

name: Tobias Reyn
bio: ML infrastructure engineer, previously scaled training pipelines at a genomics cloud platform. First company.

timeline.label: Co-founded Proteova
timeline.detail: Joined Lina Feuerstein to build the training infrastructure.

name: Amara Nwosu
bio: Practicing radiologist for nine years across two rural referral hospitals before founding Radiant Health to close the diagnostic gap she saw firsthand. No prior startup experience.

timeline.label: Began radiology practice
timeline.detail: Rural referral hospital, primary read volume of ~40 studies/day.

timeline.label: Founded Radiant Health
timeline.detail: AI-assisted triage tool for radiology in underserved regions.

name: Erik Solberg
bio: Ex-robotics lead at an industrial inspection contractor. Second company after a drone-mapping startup stalled on regulatory approval.

priorVentures.name: Skyline Survey
priorVentures.outcome: Shut down after failing to secure BVLOS flight approval in target markets

timeline.label: Founded Skyline Survey
timeline.detail: Drone-based infrastructure mapping.

timeline.label: Shut down Skyline Survey
timeline.detail: Regulatory approval for BVLOS flights never came through.

timeline.label: Founded Ferrovia Robotics
timeline.detail: Rail-bound autonomous inspection, sidestepping airspace regulation.

name: Jasmine Ruiz
bio: Former product manager on a large chat platform's community features team. Left to build Campfire after noticing async voice notes outperforming text in internal experiments.

timeline.label: Founded Campfire
timeline.detail: Async audio-only friend-group app.

name: Michael Tran
bio: Community college math instructor for six years before building Solvent's first tutoring prototype for his own students.

timeline.label: Began piloting AI tutor prototype
timeline.detail: Tested with own developmental-math sections.

timeline.label: Founded Solvent with Aaliyah Brooks
timeline.detail: Scaled the prototype into a standalone product.

name: Aaliyah Brooks
bio: Full-stack engineer previously at an edtech content platform, joined Solvent to build the tutoring engine.

timeline.label: Co-founded Solvent
timeline.detail: Joined as technical co-founder.

name: Nate Kowalski
bio: Built and sold a runtime application security tool; spent two years afterward researching agentic AI attack surfaces before founding Wardline.

priorVentures.name: Cordon Security (acquired)
priorVentures.outcome: Acquired by a public cybersecurity vendor

timeline.label: Founded Cordon Security
timeline.detail: Runtime application self-protection tooling.

timeline.label: Cordon Security acquired
timeline.detail: Acquired by a public cybersecurity vendor.

timeline.label: Founded Wardline
timeline.detail: Runtime security for AI agent tool-calling.

name: Grant Whitfield
bio: Grew up on a fourth-generation family farm; built Fieldhand after repeatedly renting idle equipment from neighbors through a group text.

timeline.label: Founded Fieldhand
timeline.detail: Marketplace for peer-to-peer farm equipment sharing.

name: Sana Malik
bio: Former port operations analyst; ran scheduling optimization pilots at one of Europe's largest container terminals before spinning the tooling out independently.

priorVentures.name: Quaydeck
priorVentures.outcome: Merged into a logistics software vendor in an acqui-hire

timeline.label: Founded Quaydeck
timeline.detail: Terminal yard-scheduling software.

timeline.label: Quaydeck acqui-hired
timeline.detail: Team joined a logistics software vendor.

timeline.label: Founded Portway
timeline.detail: Drayage scheduling optimization for ports.

name: Yusuf Demir
bio: Previously led the internal GPU scheduling platform at a European cloud provider. Second-time founder.

priorVentures.name: Batchline
priorVentures.outcome: Shut down after failing to reach product-market fit in HPC batch scheduling

timeline.label: Founded Batchline
timeline.detail: HPC batch job scheduling for research clusters.

timeline.label: Shut down Batchline
timeline.detail: Market too niche to sustain the company.

timeline.label: Founded Kernelforge with Chen Wei
timeline.detail: GPU spot-market scheduler for AI training jobs.

name: Chen Wei
bio: Distributed systems engineer, previously built training-job orchestration at a foundation model lab.

timeline.label: Co-founded Kernelforge
timeline.detail: Joined as technical co-founder.

name: Dana Ashworth
bio: Retired Space Force colonel who ran satellite servicing procurement programs before founding a first venture in orbital debris tracking.

priorVentures.name: Orbital Watch
priorVentures.outcome: Acquired by a space situational awareness company for its tracking dataset

timeline.label: Founded Orbital Watch
timeline.detail: Debris tracking dataset and analytics.

timeline.label: Orbital Watch acquired
timeline.detail: Acquired for its tracking dataset.

timeline.label: Founded Aphelion Systems
timeline.detail: In-orbit servicing robotic arms.

name: Beto Nascimento
bio: Agronomy engineer who built Rootsignal's first sensor prototype for his family's sugarcane operation before commercializing it.

timeline.label: Founded Rootsignal
timeline.detail: Soil sensor network with irrigation AI.

name: Owen Faircloth
bio: Former credit risk lead at a regional bank's small-multifamily lending desk. Second-time founder.

priorVentures.name: Brickline Capital
priorVentures.outcome: Wound down after failing to raise a lending facility

timeline.label: Founded Brickline Capital
timeline.detail: Direct small-multifamily lending.

timeline.label: Wound down Brickline Capital
timeline.detail: Could not secure a warehouse lending facility.

timeline.label: Founded Lintel with Priyanka Seth
timeline.detail: AI underwriting software licensed to lenders instead of lending directly.

name: Priyanka Seth
bio: Data scientist previously building risk models at a mortgage servicer, joined Lintel to build the underwriting engine.

timeline.label: Co-founded Lintel
timeline.detail: Joined as technical co-founder.

name: Theo Marchetti
bio: Netcode engineer at a mid-size game studio for five years, left to build Nightlatch after open-sourcing an internal rollback-netcode library.

timeline.label: Open-sourced rollback netcode library
timeline.detail: Internal tool released publicly, gained traction among indie studios.

timeline.label: Founded Nightlatch
timeline.detail: Commercialized tooling for indie multiplayer netcode.

name: Ravi Kohli
bio: Battery pack design engineer for an e-scooter OEM; left after a recall to build safer, modular, repairable packs for micromobility.

priorVentures.name: Amp & Axle
priorVentures.outcome: Wound down after a supplier dispute over cell sourcing

timeline.label: Founded Amp & Axle
timeline.detail: Battery swap network for e-scooters.

timeline.label: Wound down Amp & Axle
timeline.detail: Cell supplier dispute made unit economics unworkable.

timeline.label: Founded Voltaic Labs
timeline.detail: Open modular battery packs for e-bikes.

name: Helena Brandt
bio: In-house counsel for eight years at a mid-market industrials company, spent the last two managing external counsel spend on contract redlines she believed AI could handle.

timeline.label: Began in-house counsel career
timeline.detail: Managed commercial contracts at an industrials company.

timeline.label: Founded Statute with Marcus Lee
timeline.detail: AI contract redline assistant for in-house teams.

name: Marcus Lee
bio: NLP engineer previously at a legal-research startup, joined Statute to build the clause-comparison engine.

timeline.label: Co-founded Statute
timeline.detail: Joined as technical co-founder.
